title: GlassDelight
description: GlassDelight adds full decorative block variants (like fences, slabs, and buttons) for all concrete and stained glass types in Minecraft.
body:
Discord Link: https://discord.gg/pDaMyHDfBy  

GrowableOres(Fabric) requires Fabric Loader, Fabric API.  
GrowableOres(Forge) requires MinecraftForge.  
GrowableOres(NeoForge) requires NeoForge.  

#### Features:
GlassDelight expands your building options by adding full decorative block variants for both glass (including stained glass) and concrete. Enjoy slabs, stairs, walls, fences, gates, buttons, and pressure plates in every color. Whether you're building with sleek modern concrete or colorful stained glass, GlassDelight brings your creative vision to life.

#### For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
